clients.name: Maya Audit (SPA)
clients.description: Centraliza la auditoria de los módulos de Maya AQSS

clients.name: Maya Auth
clients.description: Gestión de roles y permisos de Maya AQSS

clients.name: Maya Dashboard (SPA)
clients.description: Panel principal. Permite el acceso de los usuarios a los diferentes módulos de Maya AQSS

clients.name: Maya DMS (SPA)
clients.description: Sistema de gestión documental de Maya AQSS

clients.name: Maya Logs (SPA)
clients.description: Control de los logs de los módulos de Maya AQSS

clientScopes.name: acr
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add acr (authentication context class reference) to the token

clientScopes.name: roles
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add user roles to the access token

clientScopes.name: web-origins
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add allowed web origins to the access token
